title: O_F_2
description:
本整合包融合养老与冒险，既能惬意享受悠闲时光，又能尽情探险，多种玩法等你解锁。
This integration pack blends the themes of a leisurely life and adventure. You can both savor a cozy, laid-back time and embark on thrilling adventures. Various gameplay options await your discovery.
body:
**Name: old_Fish_2010's Happy Homeland**
# Unique Theme, Distinctive Wonderfulness
This integration pack perfectly combines the two extremely interesting themes of "retirement-style gameplay" and "adventure", carefully creating a unique gaming world for all players! Here, you can leisurely enjoy a comfortable retirement-style gaming time, and can also instantly switch modes to embark on an exciting adventure journey. Moreover, there is an interesting "cooking" gameplay waiting for you to explore, ensuring that you won't be able to stop playing!
# Version Features
Mysterious New Biomes and Unique Structures: Brand new biomes and structures arrive with pleasant surprises. The gaming world becomes even more mysterious and unpredictable. Every corner may hide unexpected surprises, waiting for the brave you to uncover them.​
Novel Creatures Debut: A batch of unique new creatures are introduced. They have diverse shapes and novel habits, injecting new vitality into the game's ecosystem and making your gaming journey more colorful.
Convenient Backpack, No Worries about Storage: A backpack mod is thoughtfully equipped. From now on, storing and carrying items will be easy and convenient, and you no longer have to worry about items being disorganized.
Diverse Furniture, Dress Up as You Like: A large number of furniture with different styles are available for you to choose from. Whether it's a cozy little home or a luxurious castle, you can easily create it. Give full play to your creativity and decorate your exclusive gaming space.
Slaughter and Cooking, Interesting Life: The slaughter and cooking mods are integrated to completely restore the life simulation process. From obtaining ingredients to carefully cooking delicious dishes, you can immerse yourself in the hustle and bustle of life and experience the unique fun in the game.
# Q&A
Q: Will you keep updating?
A: Yes, we will keep updating.
Q: Does it support playing on the server side?
A: Currently, it doesn't support.
Q: Why are there no technology mods?
A: Because some versions don't support technology mods. We will release more versions of the integration pack in the future.





**名称：old_Fish_2010的快乐老家**
----------------------------------------------
# 独特主题，别样精彩
本整合包将**养老**与**冒险**这两大超有趣主题完美融合，为各位玩家精心打造出一个与众不同的游戏世界！在这里，你既可以慢悠悠地享受惬意养老时光，又能瞬间切换模式，开启心跳加速的冒险之旅，更有充满趣味的**烹饪**玩法等你来探索，保证让你玩到停不下来！
-----------------------------------------------
# 版本特点
1. 神秘新群系与独特结构：全新群系与结构惊喜降临，游戏世界变得更加神秘莫测，每一处角落都可能藏着意想不到的惊喜，等待勇敢的你去揭开面纱。​
2. 新奇生物闪亮登场：引入一批独特新生物，它们形态各异、习性新奇，为游戏生态注入全新活力，让你的游戏之旅更加丰富多彩。
3. 便捷背包，收纳无忧：贴心配备背包模组，从此物品收纳和携带变得轻松又便捷，再也不用担心物品杂乱无章啦。
4. 多样家具，随心装扮：超多风格各异的家具任你挑选，无论是温馨小窝还是豪华城堡，都能轻松打造，尽情发挥你的创意，装点专属的游戏空间。
5. 屠宰烹饪，趣味生活：整合屠宰和烹饪模组，完整还原生活模拟流程。从获取食材到精心烹饪出美味佳肴，沉浸式体验生活的烟火气，感受游戏中的别样乐趣。
-----------------------------------------------
# 问题回答
问：你们会持续更新吗？
答：是的，我们将持续更新。
问：是否支持服务端游玩？
答：暂时不支持。
问：为什么没有科技类模组？
答：因为部分版本不支持科技模组，以后会出更多版本的整合包
